allow: PowerShell(Get-PSDrive E | Select-Object Used,Free,@{n='FreeGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}},@{n='UsedGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}}; Write-Output '---'; try { ollama --version } catch { Write-Output 'OLLAMA_NOT_INSTALLED' }; Write-Output '---'; Write-Output "OLLAMA_MODELS=$env:OLLAMA_MODELS"; Write-Output "OLLAMA_HOST=$env:OLLAMA_HOST")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "OllamaSetup","ollama" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,CPU; Write-Output '---'; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($ollama = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe"; Write-Output "--- version ---"; & $ollama --version; Write-Output "--- env vars \(user level\) ---"; Write-Output "OLLAMA_MODELS=$\([Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('OLLAMA_MODELS','User'\)\)"; Write-Output "OLLAMA_HOST=$\([Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('OLLAMA_HOST','User'\)\)"; Write-Output "--- session env ---"; Write-Output "OLLAMA_MODELS_session=$env:OLLAMA_MODELS"; Write-Output "--- list ---"; & $ollama list; Write-Output "--- models dir ---"; Get-ChildItem "E:\\AI-System\\Ollama\\models" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
